summary: Iteration 17: Successfully tested all three new features - Fullscreen Editor, User Mentions (@@), and Article Versioning. All 17 backend tests and 24 new frontend tests passed. Also ran regression tests on existing specs (45 tests total), all passing.

test_results.frontend: 100% (69/69 Playwright tests passed across 7 spec files)

seed_data_creation: Used existing article 'Verhalten bei der IT' (art_1378b6293c09) which has Version 1 for version testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features verified working: 1) Fullscreen editor - toggles from both card header button and toolbar button, shows article title, can be closed with close button or Escape key, has full editor toolbar with 'Beenden' exit option. 2) User mentions (@@ trigger) - typing @@ in editor content shows user dropdown with name, email, and role badges (Admin/Editor), search filters users by query. 3) Article versioning - version history button only visible for existing articles, clicking opens dialog showing version list with version number, date/time, author name, Vorschau (preview) and Wiederherstellen (restore) buttons. Backend API endpoints tested: GET /api/users/search/mention, GET /api/versions/articles/{id}, GET /api/versions/articles/{id}/{version_id}, POST /api/versions/articles/{id}/{version_id}/restore

fullscreen_editor.notes: Fullscreen editor opens from both card header button (data-testid='fullscreen-editor-btn') and toolbar button. Shows article title with 'Vollbild-Editor' subtitle. Close button and Escape key both work. Full toolbar available including 'Beenden' button.

user_mentions.notes: Typing @@ in editor triggers user dropdown showing user name, email, and role badges (Admin in red, Editor in blue). Search query filters results. Users are fetched from /api/users/search/mention endpoint.

version_history.notes: Version history button (data-testid='version-history-btn') only visible for existing articles. Dialog shows version list with: version number, timestamp, author name, change summary badge (if any), Vorschau button, Wiederherstellen button. Article 'Verhalten bei der IT' has Version 1 created on 16.3.2026.

version_creation_on_save.notes: Backend creates new version when article is updated via PUT /api/articles/{id}. Tested with pytest by creating article, updating it, and verifying version count increased.

user_search_api.notes: GET /api/users/search/mention returns users with user_id, name, email, role. Supports q param for search, limit param. Excludes blocked users. Requires auth (returns 401 without).

api_tests_performed.user_mention_search_no_query: GET /api/users/search/mention returns up to 8 users sorted by name
api_tests_performed.user_mention_response_structure: Response includes user_id, name, email, role fields
api_tests_performed.version_list: GET /api/versions/articles/{id} returns version list sorted by version_number desc
api_tests_performed.version_get_specific: GET /api/versions/articles/{id}/{version_id} returns full version with title, content

ui_tests_performed.fullscreen_btn_new_article: Fullscreen button visible in card header for new articles
ui_tests_performed.fullscreen_btn_existing_article: Fullscreen button visible for existing articles
ui_tests_performed.fullscreen_opens: Clicking button opens fullscreen editor overlay
ui_tests_performed.fullscreen_title_shown: Fullscreen shows article title and 'Vollbild-Editor' text
ui_tests_performed.fullscreen_close_button: Close button works to exit fullscreen
ui_tests_performed.toolbar_vollbild_btn: Toolbar Vollbild button also opens fullscreen
ui_tests_performed.user_dropdown_content: Dropdown shows name, email, role badges
ui_tests_performed.user_dropdown_admin_badge: Admin badge shown for admin users
ui_tests_performed.user_dropdown_editor_badge: Editor badge shown for editor users
ui_tests_performed.user_mention_search: Typing search query filters dropdown results
ui_tests_performed.version_btn_hidden_new: Version history button hidden for new articles
ui_tests_performed.version_btn_visible_existing: Version history button visible for existing articles
ui_tests_performed.version_dialog_opens: Clicking button opens version history dialog
ui_tests_performed.version_entries_shown: Dialog shows version entries with date and author
